_readme: Per-case manual overrides. Edit entries and re-run scripts/merge_enrichments.py to rebuild sanctions.json with these overlays applied. All fields optional. 'reviewed' marks a case as human-verified; 'wiki_notes' adds partner-facing commentary; 'related_case_ids' links cases in the precedent web.

<case-id>.lesson_override: Override the auto-generated lesson with a sharper version.
